label: Non-axisymmetric SARI modes are confirmed numerically by Legolas with growth rates comparable to MRI

provenance.source_span: Draft version October 18, 2024 Typeset using LATEX default style in AASTeX631 Parametric Survey of Nonaxisymmetric Accretion Disk Instabilities: Magnetorotational Instability to

strengths: Numerically confirms non-axisymmetric SARI behavior with a spectral code.
weaknesses: It is primarily evidence for the unstable side of the boundary, not for Atlas stability below it.
